module relaxed_min_max.0.wasm
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_min v128:0000c0ff0000c07f0000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000c0ff0000c07f -> either:v128_lanes:f32x4:c,c,c,c|v128_lanes:f32x4:c,c,V00000000,V00000000|v128_lanes:f32x4:V00000000,V00000000,c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_min v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 v128:00000080000000000000000000000080 -> either:v128:00000080000000800000000000000080|v128:00000000000000800000000000000080|v128:00000080000000000000000000000080|v128:00000080000000800000000000000080
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_max v128:0000c0ff0000c07f0000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000c0ff0000c07f -> either:v128_lanes:f32x4:c,c,c,c|v128_lanes:f32x4:c,c,V00000000,V00000000|v128_lanes:f32x4:V00000000,V00000000,c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_max v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 v128:00000080000000000000000000000080 -> either:v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000800000000000000080|v128:00000080000000000000000000000080|v128:00000080000000800000000000000080
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> either:v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f -> either:v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000|v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000800000000000000000 -> either:v128:00000000000000800000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000800000000000000000|v128:00000000000000800000000000000080
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 -> either:v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> either:v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f -> either:v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000|v128_lanes:f64x2:c,c|v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000800000000000000000 -> either:v128:00000000000000000000000000000000|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000800000000000000000|v128:00000000000000800000000000000080
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 -> either:v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080|v128:00000000000000000000000000000080
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_min_cmp v128:0000c0ff0000c07f0000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000c0ff0000c07f -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_min_cmp v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 v128:00000080000000000000000000000080 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_max_cmp v128:0000c0ff0000c07f0000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000c0ff0000c07f -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f32x4.relaxed_max_cmp v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 v128:00000080000000000000000000000080 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min_cmp v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min_cmp v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min_cmp v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000800000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_min_cmp v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max_cmp v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max_cmp v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:000000000000f8ff000000000000f87f -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max_cmp v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000800000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return f64x2.relaxed_max_cmp v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 v128:00000000000000000000000000000080 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
